offer: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies between vendor invoices and purchase orders cause cash flow gaps. We provide reconciliation instead of manual processes.
problem: discrepancies between vendor invoices and purchase orders
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows

Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
